answer_policies.label: Grounded only
answer_policies.description: Answer only when grounded citations exist; otherwise abstain.

answer_policies.label: Cite or abstain
answer_policies.description: Require citations for final answers and refuse unsupported claims.

answer_policies.label: Needs review
answer_policies.description: Allow draft answers only when routed to review queue.

answer_policies.label: Exploratory
answer_policies.description: Permit clearly marked draft synthesis for internal exploration.

memory_policies.label: Private by default
memory_policies.description: Agent memory remains private unless a workflow creates explicit shared memory.

memory_policies.label: Workflow shared only
memory_policies.description: Shared memory is visible only to agents assigned to the workflow.
